title: What's new for AI on GKE: Training, serving, and agents
summary: Google Kubernetes Engine has added innovations for AI training, serving, and agentic workflows. The platform now supports reinforcement learning and complex AI workloads with improved reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video surveys recent additions to Google Kubernetes Engine for AI training, model serving, and agentic workflows. The platform now supports reinforcement learning and complex AI workloads, with stated gains in reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. The takeaway is that GKE is positioned to handle the full span from training through serving and agent orchestration on Kubernetes.
